content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Kefa and Park". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/problemset/problem/580/C
constraints: 1 <= number of green spots per cat <= 100
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer n, which is the number of cats. The second line contains n integers, which represent the number of green spots each cat has.
content.outputFormat: The maximum number of cats that can be in the park at the same time.

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

solution.approach: Sort the cats based on the number of green spots they have and then try to put as many cats as possible in the park.

code.Python3:
import sys
n = int(input())
arr = list(map(int, input().split()))
arr.sort()
count = 0
sum = 0
for i in range(n):
    if sum + arr[i] <= 10:
        sum += arr[i]
        count += 1
print(count)
